summary: Completed testing of Email Template Theming System. All 20 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend smoke tests pass - admin pages load correctly. The email template redesign with institution branding support is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Email template theming system properly implemented with _build_theme() helper
_build_theme() correctly checks for theme_logo_url first, then institution_logo_url fallback
When no logo present, templates use default #1E293B header with Budezivo SVG
When logo present, templates show branded header with secondary_color background + institution logo + 'powered by Budezivo' bar
_button_style() correctly uses theme primary_color for buttons
All 18 templates in TEMPLATE_REGISTRY render without errors
feedback_request and feedback_reminder templates properly integrated with centralised template system in scheduler.py
find_by_id_with_theme() in InstitutionRepositorySupabase correctly merges theme_settings into institution data
bookings.py routes use find_by_id_with_theme() to pass theme data to email triggers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email template theming fully tested. Key architecture: _build_theme(data) extracts theme_logo_url, theme_primary_color, theme_secondary_color from data dict. If logo exists: branded header with secondary_color bg + institution logo + small 'powered by Budezivo' bar. If no logo: default #1E293B header with Budezivo SVG. _button_style(theme, variant) generates inline CSS for buttons using theme colors. All 18 templates in TEMPLATE_REGISTRY. Templates affected by theming: reservation_created_teacher, reservation_confirmed, reservation_reminder_teacher, reservation_rescheduled, feedback_request, feedback_reminder. Czech UI throughout.

verified_features.feature: Backend starts without errors after template changes
Template rendering: reservation_created_teacher without theme produces default header (#1E293B bg)
Template rendering: reservation_created_teacher with theme_logo_url produces branded header (secondary_color bg + logo img)
Template rendering: reservation_confirmed without theme has no institution logo img in header
Template rendering: reservation_confirmed with theme_logo_url shows institution logo
Template rendering: reservation_rescheduled with theme uses themed button color
Template rendering: feedback_request template exists in TEMPLATE_REGISTRY and renders
Template rendering: feedback_reminder template exists in TEMPLATE_REGISTRY and renders
Template rendering: All 18 templates render without errors with minimal data
Template rendering: _build_theme returns default when no logo provided
Template rendering: _build_theme returns theme colors when theme_logo_url is provided
Template rendering: Button styles use theme primary_color when branded
